SBC News

Romania’s second most populous county of Iași will close the doors of all local land-based venues that host slot game machines. Tribal Casinos Post Record Revenues, But Sports Betting Dips Amid ‘Explosive Rise’ of Prediction Markets
CasinoBeats
2026-07-21
Tribal gaming receipts hit an all-time high last year, new figures show, with commercial casinos also reporting record revenues. However, sports betting has taken a dip, with industry chiefs blaming the “explosive rise” of prediction markets. The most recent National Indian Gaming Commission (NIGC) gross gaming revenue figures show a rise of $2.3 billion on […] The post Tribal Casinos Post Record Revenues, But Sports Betting Dips Amid ‘Explosive Rise’ of Prediction Markets appeared first on CasinoBeats .

2026-07-21
The Japanese island prefecture of Hokkaido is continuing to contemplate a bid to build Japan’s second casino. Development has already begun on the MGM Osaka, which will become the nation’s first integrated casino-resort (IR) when it opens its doors in 2030. The online betting market grew by 965% in Kazakhstan last year, with residents placing $786 million in web-based bets. Online gambling now accounts for almost two-thirds of the country’s entire betting market, per a report from the Kazakh media outlet Finprom, citing data from the Bureau of National Statistics.
